projects.title: Password Manager
projects.description: A Django-powered password vault with JWT auth, Fernet encryption, breach detection, and enterprise-style admin controls for managing users, roles, and password policies.

projects.title: File Integrity Monitoring System
projects.description: The File Integrity Monitoring System is a security application designed to detect, monitor, and report on file system changes in real-time. It creates baseline snapshots of critical files and directories, continuously monitors them for modifications, and generates alerts when changes are detected.

projects.title: Phishing Email Detection
projects.description: Machine learning model to detect and classify phishing emails using RandomForest Classifer and pattern analysis. Analyzes headers, sender behavior, and content to flag suspicious messages in real time.

projects.title: Port Scanning
projects.description: Python-based network reconnaissance tool for security assessments. Scans infrastructure, identifies open ports and active hosts, and maps potential attack surfaces using TCP/IP protocols.

projects.title: Store Management Portal
projects.description: Full-stack store management system with React frontend and Django REST backend. Features role-based access control, inventory tracking, and real-time data synchronization.
